room.caption: [Vault5] It wasn't till around the time of completing Gate 6 that I started going back to put a lot of these messages in.

instance.creationCode: vaultString=" Anger, hatred, spite... even I feel these."

bShowArrow=false exitType=0 type=0 newX=5596 newY=112
if global.gameProgress<=2290 {instance_destroy()}

if global.gameProgress<=2290 {instance_destroy()}
